tasks.title: Refactor GroupSessionDashboard Component
tasks.description: Break down the 692-line GroupSessionDashboard into smaller, focused components with proper error handling and loading states.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Write unit tests for each new component using React Testing Library.
2. Implement integration tests to ensure proper interaction between components.
3. Use mock service worker (msw) to simulate API responses for testing error states and loading behaviors.
4. Implement snapshot tests for UI consistency.
5. Use Cypress for end-to-end testing of the entire session workflow.

tasks.title: Implement Standardized Data Fetching Pattern
tasks.description: Create a standardized data fetching pattern using React Query and the singleton supabase client, ensuring proper RLS implementation.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Write unit tests for the custom hook using React Hooks Testing Library.
2. Implement integration tests to ensure proper interaction with Supabase and React Query.
3. Use mock service worker (msw) to simulate Supabase responses and test error handling.
4. Test retry mechanisms by simulating network failures.
5. Verify RLS implementation by attempting to access data without proper authentication.

tasks.title: Standardize Layout and Fix Header Duplication
tasks.description: Ensure consistent ProtectedLayout usage without header duplication and implement proper page containers and spacing.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Implement visual regression tests using tools like Percy or Chromatic to ensure consistent layout across pages.
2. Write unit tests for the ProtectedLayout component using React Testing Library.
3. Use Cypress for end-to-end tests to verify proper layout rendering and responsiveness.
4. Test error boundary functionality by intentionally throwing errors in child components.
5. Verify accessibility using automated tools like axe-core and manual keyboard navigation tests.

tasks.title: Implement Proper Authentication Patterns
tasks.description: Audit and fix any direct clerk_id usage, implement consistent authentication error handling, and add proper loading states for authentication flows.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Write unit tests for the getAuthenticatedUserId function using jest and mock the Supabase client.
2. Implement integration tests for the AuthProvider component using React Testing Library.
3. Create end-to-end tests using Cypress to verify the entire authentication flow.
4. Test error scenarios by mocking failed API responses and ensuring proper error handling.
5. Verify that loading states are displayed correctly during authentication processes.

tasks.title: Implement Mobile-Responsive Design for Sessions Page
tasks.description: Enhance the Sessions page with mobile-responsive design to ensure full functionality on various device sizes.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Use Jest and React Testing Library to write unit tests for responsive components.
2. Implement visual regression tests using tools like Percy or Chromatic to catch unintended layout changes across different screen sizes.
3. Use Cypress for end-to-end testing, including mobile viewport simulations.
4. Manually test on various physical devices (phones, tablets) to ensure proper rendering and functionality.
5. Use Lighthouse in Chrome DevTools to test for mobile performance and accessibility.
6. Implement cross-browser testing using BrowserStack or similar services to ensure consistency across different mobile browsers.

tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Error Handling
tasks.description: Add comprehensive error handling with user-friendly messages across all components and data fetching operations.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Write unit tests for error handling utilities using Jest.
2. Create integration tests for components with error states using React Testing Library.
3. Simulate various error scenarios (network errors, API errors, authentication errors) in end-to-end tests using Cypress.
4. Verify that error messages are user-friendly and provide appropriate guidance.
5. Test error logging functionality by mocking Sentry or other logging services.
6. Ensure that error boundaries catch and display errors correctly at different levels of the component tree.

tasks.title: Implement Performance Tracking for Athletes
tasks.description: Develop a reliable performance tracking system for athletes within the Sessions page.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Write unit tests for performance API functions using Jest and mock Supabase responses.
2. Implement integration tests for the PerformanceChart component using React Testing Library and mock data.
3. Create end-to-end tests using Cypress to verify the entire performance tracking workflow.
4. Test real-time updates by simulating Supabase realtime events in a test environment.
5. Verify that performance data is accurately represented in charts and visualizations.
6. Implement performance tests to ensure efficient rendering of charts with large datasets.
7. Test edge cases such as missing data points or irregular intervals in performance metrics.

tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Testing Suite
tasks.description: Develop and implement a comprehensive testing suite covering unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for all new and refactored components.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Aim for at least 80% code coverage across all components and utilities.
2. Implement snapshot testing for UI components to catch unintended changes.
3. Use mock data and API mocking to test various scenarios, including error states.
4. Implement visual regression testing to catch unintended UI changes.
5. Run end-to-end tests on multiple browser configurations using a service like BrowserStack.
6. Implement performance benchmarks and set thresholds for key metrics (e.g., Time to Interactive, First Contentful Paint).
7. Regularly review and update tests as new features are added or existing ones are modified.
8. Integrate test results and coverage reports into the code review process.
